title: Local diagnostics and error-reporting stance

acceptance_criteria.text: Decide and document the product stance on telemetry, crash reports, diagnostics, and learner privacy.
If no telemetry is used, provide a local diagnostic export path that helps support without sending data automatically.
Ensure diagnostic exports redact or exclude sensitive learner content unless the user explicitly chooses to include it.
Add user-facing troubleshooting guidance for collecting logs, app version, platform, content version, and backup/error context.
Test representative failure paths and confirm errors are visible, actionable, and do not corrupt learner state.

source: Gap review: crash/error reporting stance; reopened for AC-4 content.revision (id-only then full-payload fingerprint)
